UI components and animation management for Pebble firmware, including legacy action bar, menu, and text layers.


## Files
- **[action_bar_layer_legacy2.c](action_bar_layer_legacy2.c.md)**: Implements the ActionBarLayerLegacy2 UI component for managing action bar layers in Pebble firmware.
- **[action_bar_layer_legacy2.h](action_bar_layer_legacy2.h.md)**: Defines the ActionBarLayerLegacy2 structure and functions for creating and managing a vertical control widget in Pebble firmware.
- **[animation_legacy2.c](animation_legacy2.c.md)**: Implements animation scheduling and management for the Pebble firmware, including custom curve support.
- **[animation_legacy2.h](animation_legacy2.h.md)**: Framework for creating and managing animations in Pebble apps, including custom animation implementations.
- **[animation_private_legacy2.h](animation_private_legacy2.h.md)**: Defines the `AnimationLegacy2Scheduler` struct and functions for initializing and unscheduling animations.
- **[menu_layer_legacy2.c](menu_layer_legacy2.c.md)**: Implements legacy menu layer initialization and callback setup for Pebble firmware.
- **[menu_layer_legacy2.h](menu_layer_legacy2.h.md)**: Defines legacy menu layer callbacks and functions for initializing and creating menu layers.
- **[property_animation_legacy2.c](property_animation_legacy2.c.md)**: Implements legacy property animations for int16, GPoint, and GRect types in the Pebble firmware.
- **[property_animation_legacy2.h](property_animation_legacy2.h.md)**: Defines the PropertyAnimationLegacy2 class for animating properties of a subject, such as a layer's frame, using various data types.
- **[status_bar_legacy2.h](status_bar_legacy2.h.md)**: Implements a 2.x status bar for backward compatibility with older firmware apps.
- **[text_layer_legacy2.c](text_layer_legacy2.c.md)**: Implements the TextLayerLegacy2 component for managing text display and layout in the Pebble firmware.
- **[text_layer_legacy2.h](text_layer_legacy2.h.md)**: Defines the `TextLayerLegacy2` structure and functions for managing text display and formatting in a UI layer.
